63829f6fe2cbd63208bfe702.leadin_sanitized: An unnamed governess cares for Miles and Flora in one of his works. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this author of The Turn of the Screw.
Chadwick Newsome leaves Madame Marie de Vionnet, and Lewis Strether returns to America at the end of this Henry James novel.
In this Henry James novella, Winterbourne is rejected by the title character, who dies of “Roman fever” after Giovanelli takes her to the Colosseum.
